title: strychnos recognita
intro: Strychnos recognita is a plant species commonly known as the African strychnine tree or the strychnine berry tree, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. The plant's medicinal properties are derived from its alkaloids, including strychnine, which has been used in traditional medicine for its ability to stimulate the nervous system and increase muscle tone. The health benefits of Strychnos recognita include its use as a treatment for various ailments such as rheumatism, fever, and respiratory issues, although its toxic nature requires careful handling and administration. Traditionally, the plant's alkaloids are prepared as a paste or infusion for medicinal purposes, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
